features: Our best selling Turmeric clay face mask with bentonite clay and witch hazel deeply cleanses and gently exfoliates clarifying skin to remove impurities and excess oils, the perfect blemish treatment.
Purifying and anti bacterial with Zinc PCA, our oily skin clay mask is an excellent pore minimiser to help unclog congested pores for smoother, softer skin
Vegan friendly, formulated without; SLS, parabens, mineral oil, phthalates, synthetic fragrance & colourants
Got maskne? Meet Botanical Lab, your new skincare BFF! Our range can help treat maskne prone skin and will help improve your overall skin health, tone and texture.
description: Product Description Our Turmeric Clay Face mask is a deep cleansing treatment containing zinc PCA that works by unclogging pores and removing excess oil without overdrying the skin. This skin mattifying face mask contains mineral rich clay to help gently exfoliate, remove debris and impurities, keeping blemishes at bay . Formulated with witch hazel a natural astringent for pore refining it's our best face mask for oily skin, leaving it feeling clearer, softer and smoother. Ingredients Aqua, Kaolin, Glycerin, Bentonite, Propanediol, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Powder, Polysorbate 20, Phenoxyethanol, Xanthan Gum, Polyacrylate Crosspolymer-6, Hamamelis Virginiana (Witch Hazel) Water, Dichlorobenzyl Alcohol, Propylene Glycol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Disodium EDTA, Alcohol, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Peel Oil, Melia Azadirachta Leaf Extract, Myristica Fragrans Fruit Oil (Nutmeg), Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Zinc PCA, Cinnamomum Zeylanicum Bark Extract, Deceth-7, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Rosa Damascena Flower Oil, PPG-26-Buteth-26, Sorbitol, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, CI 77499, CI 77492.
